enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of the song Kalasala Kalasala?

The song was released in 2011.

Who are the singers of Kalasala Kalasala?

The song is sung by L R Eswari, Solar Sai, and T Rajendar.

Who composed the music for the movie Osthi?

The music was composed by Thaman S.

What is the theme of the song Kalasala Kalasala?

The song is an energetic dance number that celebrates fun and festivity.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kalasala Kalasala?

The lyrics were penned by Vaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kalasala Kalasala from the movie Osthi is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by L R Eswari, Solar Sai, and T Rajendar, the track is a vibrant mix of catchy beats and lively lyrics by Vaali. Thaman S's music direction adds a pulsating rhythm that makes it a perfect party anthem. The song is set in a festive context within the movie, enhancing the mood of fun and excitement. It evokes a sense of happiness and is ideal for any celebratory occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with the electrifying beats of Kalasala Kalasala from the movie Osthi. This energetic track, brought to life by the dynamic voices of L R Eswari, Solar Sai, and T Rajendar, is a perfect blend of Thaman S's vibrant music and Vaali's catchy lyrics. Experience the ultimate party anthem that will make you hit the dance floor instantly!
stanzaMeanings: Kalasala kalasala Kalasala kalasala Kalaasala kalasala, Kalaasala kalasala Kallaasala kalasala, Kalaasala kalasala Kalaasala kalasala, Kalaasala kalasala Kallaasala kalasala, Kalaasala kalasala
Ask around and see what they say about me, like a betel leaf, my name spreads slowly.

Ask around and see what they say about me, like a betel leaf, my name spreads slowly. No one can climb the Kodambakkam bus. He will make even Rajinikanth hiss. Mallika, if you bite, it will be sweet like a gooseberry. If you spread a mat, you will study well. If you speak sweetly, honey will drip.
If you hold a grudge, it will be in your heart. If you break a cucumber, it will be unnecessary. My dear darling, Mallika is calling you.
Silk and cotton, tightly wrapped. Touch me, hold me tight. Two become one, agree with me. Will the heat go away, will the fever leave, unknowingly making mistakes again and again.
You tease like a crow, softly. My cheeks are like stones, shining.
The drum beats loudly, the heart is empty. If you give, you are generous, I will give you, come. My dear darling, Mallika is calling you.
.. Osthi has come.. Hey man, Osthi. Come close, come here, come here, sing man, hey put it, jasmine, sing man, hey put it, jasmine.
Friend, party, Mallika is beautiful. Showing her heart, lighting a fire. Without killing, you kill me every day.
Someone has come who suits your age, stop running away.

You are a lion, a golden treasure, Osthi. Who will wrestle with you? If you bathe, you are a whirlwind, if you hit, you are a storm, from now on, you will be a troublemaker in the dark. My dear darling, Mallika is calling you.
Come here, come here. Mallika, my darling, come, let's have fun. Let's plant seeds on the mattress and enjoy. My heart started singing something, when I saw you, my temperature rose.
